content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the force-complete reconciliation leak in src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs. Force-completed terminal review findings are now excluded from covered_by_existing_bead reconciliation before any br comment mutation path runs, while the existing force-completed propose_new_bead hook still receives the full finding set and creates only proposal follow-up beads. Added regression coverage for a force-completed mixed fix_current_bead plus covered_by_existing_bead deferral with no br comments, and strengthened the mixed deferral follow-up test to include covered_by_existing_bead alongside propose_new_bead.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect terminal review reconciliation paths for covered_by_existing_bead, force_completed filtering, and force-completed propose_new_bead follow-up creation.
2. [Completed] Filter force-completed findings out of covered-by-existing reconciliation so non-proposal deferrals stay journal-only for operator decision.
3. [Completed] Preserve the full terminal finding set for force-completed propose_new_bead follow-up creation, and reuse the non-force-completed set for ordinary proposed-bead reconciliation.
4. [Completed] Add mixed-classification regression coverage proving force-completed covered_by_existing_bead deferrals do not post or flush br comments, while propose_new_bead deferrals still create one follow-up bead.
5. [Completed] Run targeted and full validation gates required by the repository.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop --command cargo test --features test-stub --locked force_completed -- --nocapture passed: both force-completed regression tests passed.
- nix develop --command cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix develop --command cargo test --features test-stub --locked passed: 1340 lib tests, 379 CLI tests, 1 run_attach_tmux test, 1130 unit tests, and doctests all passed with expected ignored tests.
- nix develop --command cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings passed.
- nix build passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
